title: MCP Audit Event
description: A single structured audit record describing one observable action on an MCP server. See SPEC.md for field semantics and SIEM mappings.

spec_version.description: Version of the mcp-audit event specification this record conforms to.

event_id.description: Unique identifier of this event (UUID, lowercase hex).

event_type.description: The kind of action this event records.

timestamp.description: Event completion time in RFC 3339 UTC with millisecond or finer precision.

traceparent.description: W3C Trace Context traceparent header value (version 00). Propagated from the client request _meta when present (SEP-414), otherwise generated by the audit layer.

tracestate.description: W3C Trace Context tracestate header value, if propagated.

session_id.description: Identifier of the MCP session this event belongs to. Transport session id when available, otherwise generated per connection.

server.description: The MCP server that produced this event.

client.description: The MCP client on the other side of the session, as reported during initialize.

principal.description: Authenticated identity on whose behalf the action ran (e.g. OAuth subject), when known.

tool.description: Details of the tool invocation. Required for event_type tool_call.

arguments.description: Inline copy of the call arguments after redaction. Absent when the redaction mode is omit.

resource.description: Details of the resource read. Required for event_type resource_read.

prompt.description: Details of the prompt invocation. Required for event_type prompt_invoke.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the action in milliseconds. Required for tool_call, resource_read and prompt_invoke.

attributes.description: Deployment-specific extension attributes. Keys should be namespaced (e.g. acme.region).

digest.description: Integrity digest of the original (pre-redaction) arguments, so the full payload never needs to be stored.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonical JSON encoding (sorted keys, no insignificant whitespace, UTF-8) of the original arguments.

byte_length.description: Byte length of the canonical JSON encoding of the original arguments.

redacted_keys.description: Keys (dot-paths) whose values were redacted in the inline copy.
